links.description: Dave's concerns about regional safety and the 10% geographic weight proposal
concerned that several high-priority chemical transload facilities in the Vancouver port area have been downgraded to 'Medium' or 'Low' risk
opposes the 'Low Risk' classification of high-volume transload facilities in the Vancouver corridor under the 10% weighting (v1 table)
The inclusion of the Mississauga and Hamilton corridor sites at a 'High' risk level
initiation of the Risk Score Re-evaluation project in principle
national roll-out of the new Risk Score model
impressed with how the Risk Model has stabilized our oversight planning
